description.en: First steps — the essential building blocks of Dutch: greetings, introductions, telling people about yourself, and asking basic questions.
People and numbers — talking about family, relationships, and handling everyday transactions with confidence.
Time and social life — telling the time, daily routines, making plans, and the social language of Belgian Dutch.
Real-world Dutch — weather, schedules, and shopping trips, with the grammar needed for more complex everyday situations.
